# Drone Collision Warning System

For the divide-and-conquer algorithm, only need to check the 'point_set.py' document. 

## Building and Running

1. Run main.py to test the program in terminal mode.

### Input Format:
id, x_position (0-500), y_position (0-500), z_position (50-550)

(enter) (input finished)
id (the drone you want to query)

(enter)
192

#### Sample Output:

 ============================================================
 Query Result:
 ============================================================
 Query drone: 192
   Position: (203.40, 380.31, 390.34)
 Nearest neighbor drone: 182
   Position: (214.70, 356.97, 370.67)
 Distance: 32.55 meters
 ============================================================

2. Run app.py to test the program in gui mode.

### Tips: 
1. The system give warnings when distance <= 20m and withdraw when distance > 50m in gui mode.
2. It's better to set the number of drones within 200-300.
